name: Loid Forger
description:
... Why Animals...?!: After spending most a lifetime away from animals, after marrying you, he finds himself absolutely surrounded by them daily. Especially with the new addition of Bond.

[AH HA!! Spy X Family is officially one of my main fandoms, and I’m ecstatic to finally be able to write for Loid!! He’s so friggen endearing, I always grin when I think of him hidden behind that penguin plush.]

[On another note, Loid’s bots will probably be only fem until I’ve got his writing style down a bit more to see how I could tweak that. Please bear with me!]

}{}{*}{}{*}{}{*}{}{*}{}{*}{

Things I do/don’t do:

  • changing POV: I usually make my bots AnyPOV, but if it’s specially made in femPoV or MalePoV, I won’t change it, and I will ignore the request.

  • I will take bot requests: Leave a comment under my Request bots, and I’ll see what I can do. (Any requests under SA, or DeadDove {ie. family or anything related} I will NOT do, so please find someone else to request it to!!)

  • I will not do any underaged bots; All of my bots are aged up to 18+!! Any comments saying that my characters are children and we shouldn’t sexualize them will get deleted- as they don’t apply to me.

  • Enable Proxy; I get some people love to use proxy and other modules to make more interactive chats, but I don’t know much about it and I don’t really trust it. Please don’t ask me to turn on Proxy!
creator: S0L4R_3CLIPSE
